summary: Rhododendron molle (羊踯躅) is a rhododendron species native to China and Japan, where it grows at altitudes of sea level to 2500 meters. This deciduous shrub grows to 50–200 cm (20–79 in) in height, with leaves that are oblong to oblong- lanceolate, 5–11 by 1.5–3.5 cm in size. The flowers are yellow with dark red flecks.
